Document:
# Lagomorph
[bold]Lagomorphs[/bold] are an [bold][color=#4df]oxygen breathing[/color][/bold], sulfur blooded species, with round snouts and tall ears resembling rabbits.
Their dense fur makes them [bold][color=#4df]prefer colder temperatures[/color][/bold] and [bold][color=#f44]heat up faster[/color][/bold] than most other species.They take [bold][color=#4df]15% less cold damage[/color][/bold] but [bold][color=#f44]15% more heat damage[/color][/bold]
Lagomorphs have an [bold]obligate vegetarian diet[/bold], meaning they must necessarily eat plant based meals, and [bold]get sick from animal protein[/bold].
Lagomorphs can [bold]break into a sprint[/bold] to move faster for [bold]3 seconds[/bold] at the cost of [bold][color=#4df]stamina damage[/color][/bold]. But watch out! If you try to sprint while already tired, such as after slipping, you will end up moving slower than usual!
